LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, MOTION UNDER CCP SECTION 473(B), IS DENIED. THE MANDATORY ATTORNEY FAULT PROVISION OF CCP 473(B) ONLY APPLIES TO "DEFAULT," "DEFAULT JUDGMENT," AND "DISMISSALS." RELIEF FROM AN ORDER SUSTAINING A DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IS THEREFORE NOT AVAILABLE UNDER THIS SUBSECTION. (ENGLISH V. IKON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS, INC. (2001) 94 CAL.APP.4TH 130.) PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185; DEPT. 302. =302/HK

Notice Of Motion Under Ccp Section 473(B)
Off Calendar May-06-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS SANTOS PUC MAY AND JOSE DELFINO PUC'S Motion Under CCP Section 473(B) is Denied. The mandatory attorney fault provision of CCP 473(b) only applies to "default," "default judgment," and "dismissals." Relief from an order sustaining a demurrer without leave to amend is therefore not available under this subsection. (English v. IKON Business Solutions, Inc. (2001) 94 Cal.App.4th 130.) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/hk
